models.name: GPT-5.4
models.description: Most capable GPT model with 1M context window and enhanced reasoning

changelog.description: Initial release of GPT-5.4 with 1M context window
API pricing set at $3.00 per 1M input tokens and $12.00 per 1M output tokens

models.name: GPT-5.5
models.description: Frontier GPT model for professional work, coding, and complex reasoning in ChatGPT and Codex

changelog.description: GPT-5.5 introduced for ChatGPT, Codex, and upcoming API access with 1M context
API pricing announced at $5.00 per 1M input tokens and $30.00 per 1M output tokens

models.name: GPT-5.5 Pro
models.description: Higher-compute GPT-5.5 variant for the most difficult reasoning and coding tasks

changelog.description: GPT-5.5 Pro introduced as the high-compute GPT-5.5 mode for harder questions and higher-accuracy work
API pricing announced at $30.00 per 1M input tokens and $180.00 per 1M output tokens

models.name: GPT-5.4 Mini
models.description: Smaller GPT-5.4 variant optimized for lower latency and cost while retaining strong tool and coding performance

changelog.description: GPT-5.4 Mini released in the API, Codex, and ChatGPT with 400K context
API pricing set at $0.75 per 1M input tokens and $4.50 per 1M output tokens
Rolled out in ChatGPT as Thinking access for Free and Go users and as a fallback for GPT-5.4 Thinking limits

models.name: GPT-5.4 Nano
models.description: Lowest-cost GPT-5.4 family model for high-throughput classification, extraction, and lightweight agent tasks

changelog.description: GPT-5.4 Nano released for latency-sensitive and high-volume workloads in the API
API pricing set at $0.20 per 1M input tokens and $1.25 per 1M output tokens

models.name: GPT-5.2
models.description: High-performance GPT model with 512K context window

changelog.description: Initial release of GPT-5.2 with 512K context
Improved instruction following and reduced hallucination rate

models.name: GPT-5.1
models.description: Balanced GPT-5 series model with strong reasoning capabilities

changelog.description: Initial release of GPT-5.1
Improved multilingual performance

models.name: GPT-5
models.description: First model in the GPT-5 series, major leap in reasoning and knowledge

changelog.description: GPT-5 launched — significant improvement over GPT-4 series
Price reduced from $3.00/$12.00 to $2.00/$8.00

models.name: GPT-4.1
models.description: Enhanced GPT-4 with 1M context window and improved coding

changelog.description: GPT-4.1 released with 1M context window, best-in-class coding
Improved function calling reliability

models.name: GPT-4.1 Mini
models.description: Cost-effective GPT-4.1 variant with 1M context window

changelog.description: GPT-4.1 Mini released alongside GPT-4.1

models.name: GPT-4o
models.description: Omni model with native multimodal capabilities

changelog.description: GPT-4o launched as first natively multimodal model
gpt-4o-2024-08-06 update with structured outputs
gpt-4o-2024-11-20 with improved creative writing

models.name: GPT-4o Mini
models.description: Small, affordable multimodal model for lightweight tasks

changelog.description: GPT-4o Mini launched as affordable alternative to GPT-4o

models.name: o4-mini
models.description: Compact reasoning model optimized for STEM and coding tasks

changelog.description: o4-mini released with enhanced STEM reasoning capabilities

models.name: o3
models.description: Advanced reasoning model with breakthrough performance on complex tasks

changelog.description: o3 launched with state-of-the-art reasoning on ARC-AGI and math benchmarks

models.name: o3-mini
models.description: Cost-effective reasoning model for STEM and analytical tasks

changelog.description: o3-mini released as affordable reasoning model
o1-preview launched as first reasoning model
Full o1 model released with vision support and 200K context

models.name: o1-mini
models.description: Compact reasoning model optimized for STEM tasks

changelog.description: o1-mini launched alongside o1-preview

models.name: GPT-4 Turbo
models.description: Previous flagship model, replaced by GPT-4o series

changelog.description: GPT-4 Turbo with Vision launched
Deprecated in favor of GPT-4o and GPT-5 series

models.name: GPT-3.5 Turbo
models.description: Legacy model, replaced by GPT-4o Mini

changelog.description: GPT-3.5 Turbo launched
gpt-3.5-turbo-0125 with improved accuracy
Deprecated — migrate to GPT-4o Mini
